steps.name: ci-workflow-typecheck-lint-test
steps.summary: .github/workflows/ci.yml — single verify job (ubuntu-latest, Node from .nvmrc, pnpm via packageManager) running checkout → pnpm/action-setup@v4 → setup-node@v4(cache: pnpm) → pnpm install --frozen-lockfile → pnpm -r typecheck → pnpm lint → pnpm test on push to main and all PRs; concurrency cancels stale runs, permissions: contents: read, timeout 15m. Verified locally: YAML parses, frozen-lockfile install, typecheck, lint, and 379 vitest tests all green.
